value.description_summary: Input tensor to which the bias vector will be added, and it may have any number of dimensions.

bias.description_summary: 1-D bias vector whose length matches the last dimension of the value tensor for broadcasting addition.

data_format.description_summary: Specifies the layout order of dimensions in value and determines which axis the bias is added to.

llm_reasoning: The documentation states that the value tensor may have any number of dimensions, so the primary data tensor accepts arbitrary rank.
